title: HowManyItems Fabric
description: A GUI inventory editor and recipe viewer for beta 1.7.3.
body:
An unofficial fabric port of [HowManyItems](https://modrinth.com/mod/howmanyitems) to [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi).

Features of the existing mod:

- Server-safe inventory editing, time changing, weather setting and recipe viewing.
- A mod integration API, allowing mods to add their own recipe types to the viewer.
- A fairly extensive config to change how HMI behaves for yourself.

Features of the port:

- Shapeless recipe indicator.
- Multiplayer metadata giving (requires mod on the server).
- CTRL+clicking the settings button directly toggles cheat mode.
- Uses GCAPI as the config backend, giving modders an example on how to make their own config GUIs while maintaining the convienient code of GCAPI.
